name: SmaragdCon
description:
SmaragdCon is a welcoming small cosplay convention located in Eidsvoll municipality, organised by young enthusiasts dedicated to creating engaging experiences for the local community.

The convention is run by Borgen cosplay and gaming club in collaboration with Ung Fritid at Eidsvoll kommune, with a focus on making a pleasant con experience — especially for those attending their first convention.

guests.name: Kaja Kalland
guests.title: Featured guest
guests.bio: Tabletop designer; author of 'Aldermark', a Nordic-folklore RPG.

guests.name: Joakim Bakken
guests.title: Spotlight
guests.bio: Plushie and soft-sculpture maker specialising in original characters.

guests.name: Ida Bjørndal
guests.title: Panellist
guests.bio: Pixel-art studio lead; known for the cult retro-RPG 'Ravnehjem'.

guests.name: Halvard Rinde
guests.title: Panellist
guests.bio: Bergen-based cosplayer specialising in armour and prop fabrication. Runs the Nordic Armour Workshop for new makers.

guests.name: Jorunn Nordheim
guests.title: MC
guests.bio: Oslo manga artist whose serial 'Halvtimes' won the 2024 Sproing nominee shortlist.

notes: SmaragdCon 2026 (theme: Enchanted Forest) is announced on the front page with venues Panorama kulturhus + Eidsvoll bibliotek, but specific dates were not visible on the homepage and could not be located via search — left null. No standalone logo asset was exposed; only the announcement banner was available.
